ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the program */,
  "expected_graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year the student is expected to graduate */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, on leave, graduated) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student for easy communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student for record-keeping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guide */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the guide */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guide */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the guide belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the guide (e.g., Assistant Professor, Professor) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the guide */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the guide for easy communication */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co_guides" (
  "co_guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-guide */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the co-guide */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the co-guide */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the co-guide belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the co-guide (e.g., Assistant Professor, Professor) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the co-guide */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the co-guide for easy communication */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the co-guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical sector structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student working on the project */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guide for the project */,
  "co_guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-guide for the project */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the project belongs to */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., M. Tech Project 1, M. Tech Project 2) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, delayed) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES guides ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_co_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_guide_id") REFERENCES co_guides ("co_guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the download belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the download */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the download in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the download was uploaded */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been downloaded */,
  "last_downloaded" TEXT /* Date and time of the last download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the submission belongs to */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the project was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., interim report, final report) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who will review the submission */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_submissions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES guides ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_submissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., interim, final) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who will review the report */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES guides ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
